title: Refine customer summary layout, limit timeline comments, and containerize documents

requirements.text: In the activity timeline component, display a maximum of two comments at a time instead of the current three

quotes: in the activity timeline, display a maximum of two comments at a time

acceptanceCriteria: ActivityTimeline component shows at most 2 activity entries visible in the scrollable area
Scrolling remains functional to view older activities beyond the initial 2

requirements.text: In the customer summary section of the case detail page, reposition the phone number and phone icon to be horizontally inline with the contract ID field

quotes: in the customer summary, move up the Phone number and icon to be horizontally inline with contract id

acceptanceCriteria: Phone number and phone icon appear on the same horizontal line as Contract ID
Layout remains responsive and visually balanced

requirements.text: In the customer summary section of the case detail page, swap the positions of Customer ID and Contract ID so that Customer ID appears in the top left position and Contract ID appears in the bottom right position

quotes: switch the positions of Contract ID and Customer ID so the Customer ID is on the top left and Contract ID is on the bottom right

acceptanceCriteria: Customer ID is positioned in the top left area of the customer summary
Contract ID is positioned in the bottom right area of the customer summary
Both fields maintain their copy button functionality

requirements.text: In the documents section, enclose each document in a visual container that spans from the document icon on the left to the preview icon on the right

quotes: in rhe document section, enclose each document in a container, from the document icon to the preview icon

acceptanceCriteria: Each document row is visually enclosed in a distinct container (border, background, or card)
Container spans the full width from the file type icon to the preview/download action icons
Container styling is consistent with the existing design system

constraints: Do not modify backend logic or data structures
Maintain existing scrolling functionality in the activity timeline
Preserve all interactive functionality (copy buttons, preview actions, etc.)
nonGoals: Changing the number of activities loaded from the backend
Altering the activity form or outcome options
